visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a patterned red hoodie and blue jeans walks into a brightly lit, minimalist indoor office with white walls and a light-colored wooden table. A woman with long black hair, wearing a pink long-sleeved shirt, sits at the table looking up at him as he gestures emphatically while speaking. (2) Close-up shot of the man's face as he talks directly into the camera with an expressive, almost exaggerated facial expression. Bold white text with black outlines appears as overlays on the screen, changing as he speaks in a sequence of fast-paced cuts. (3) A technician in a blue polo shirt, black pants, black cap, and face mask is shown in a montage performing cleaning tasks. He uses a handheld sprayer to apply a liquid to white cabinets and office walls. A larger machine on the floor emits a thick white fog/smoke into the room. (4) A digital meter on a white surface displays 0.000 prominently. Different angles show various white plastic jugs and small jars containing clear or light green liquids, which are product samples for the cleaning service. (5) The man and woman are back together in the office. They stand in front of large, empty wooden shelves. The man continues to speak and gesture with his hands while the woman listens and occasionally brushes her hair back, smiling. (6) The man concludes the video with a direct-to-camera address, using wide hand gestures to emphasize his points. Graphic overlays with brand information and service details appear around him in the bright studio-like environment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 老闆娘. [Variety]: 吸毒. (2) [Slogan]: 馬上進來辦公. (3) [Slogan]: 全都是甲醛. (4) [Variety]: 開窗戶來不及. (5) [Slogan]: 佳迪恩環保科技. (6) [Slogan]: 高階還氧技術. (7) [Slogan]: 精準去除室內甲醛. (8) [Slogan]: 專屬分解劑. (9) [Slogan]: 施作後半年 追蹤複檢 保障長期健康. (10) [Slogan]: 哈佛辦公室. (11) [Slogan]: 客製化方案. (12) [Slogan]: 提供最專業的檢測和治理方案.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 main female participant, 1 technician in background montage
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man in a red patterned hoodie and blue jeans; a woman in a pink long-sleeved shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern office with white walls, white cabinets, light wood tables, and empty wooden bookshelves. Some shots include professional cleaning equipment and product bottles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-arousal male vocal delivery with a rapid speech rate and dramatic pitch variations. He sounds loud and confrontational yet comedic. An upbeat, acoustic guitar-led BGM with a steady 4/4 rhythm and moderate tempo plays in the background. (2) A short, bright digital 'ding' SFX marks a transition to a more professional, narrative-style vocal delivery by the same male speaker. The BGM continues at a consistent volume as a bed. (3) A continuous hissing sound of a pressurized sprayer (SFX) is heard alongside the narration. The male voice maintains a clear, enunciated tone with high dominance and positive valence. (4) A female voice enters the audio track with a moderate pitch and calm, impressed tone. She engages in a brief dialogue with the male speaker. The acoustic BGM remains a constant. (5) A percussive 'whoosh' SFX transitions to the final wrap-up phase. The male voice increases in loudness and energy, delivering a confident promotional pitch for the environmental service. The BGM swells slightly before a clean hard cut at the end.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem Identification -> Solution Presentation -> Evidence/Proof -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the professional formaldehyde removal services of Giadian Environmental Technology (佳迪恩環保科技) through a humorous and energetic vlog-style demonstration.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the brand, shows their equipment, technician, and highlights the specific technological advantages and health benefits of their service.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Social-media style commercial using a popular creator's energetic persona to make technical environmental services engaging.
